name: Softronic AB
summary: Softronic AB provides IT and management services in primarily in Sweden. The company offers scanning, application hosting, secure communication, digital sales platform, cyber defense as a service, compliance manager, business system, office support, travel and event, issue management system, e-commerce, e-health, insurance system, and digitization solutions. It also provides artificial intelligence, member system, premium solution partner, digital market communication, IT and business management, customer care system, and outsourcing solutions, as well as solutions for administration and communication between students, teachers, and parents. Softronic AB was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
